Pixel Neural Networks

model module

class model.ConditionalPixelCNN(n_channel: int = 3, h: int = 32, latent_dim: int = 128, discrete_channel: int = 256)[source]

Bases: PixelCNN

PixelCNN decoder conditioned on a latent vector z.

Extends PixelCNN by projecting z onto the feature space and adding it after the first masked convolution block.

Parameters:

  • n_channel (int) – Number of image channels.

  • h (int) – Bottleneck dimension.

  • latent_dim (int) – Dimensionality of the conditioning latent vector.

  • discrete_channel (int) – Number of discrete intensity values (default 256).

forward(x: Tensor, z: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Forward pass conditioned on latent vector z.

Parameters:

  • x (torch.Tensor) – Input image tensor of shape (B, C, H, W).

  • z (torch.Tensor) – Latent vector of shape (B, latent_dim).

Returns:

Output logits of shape (B, C, H, W, 256).

Return type:

torch.Tensor

class model.GatedPixelCNN(n_channel: int = 3, h: int = 64, n_block: int = 12)[source]

Bases: Module

Gated PixelCNN with vertical and horizontal stacks.

Eliminates the blind spot of the original PixelCNN by separating vertical context (rows above) from horizontal context (pixels to the left on the current row) and combining them via a learned projection. A shared skip accumulator is passed through all blocks and used for the final output projection.

Parameters:

  • n_channel (int) – Number of image channels.

  • h (int) – Number of feature channels throughout the network.

  • n_block (int) – Number of GatedPixelCNNBlock layers.

forward(x: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Forward pass of GatedPixelCNN.

Parameters:

x (torch.Tensor) – Input image tensor of shape (B, C, H, W).

Returns:

Output logits of shape (B, C, H, W, 256).

Return type:

torch.Tensor

class model.PixelCNN(n_channel: int = 3, h: int = 128, discrete_channel: int = 256, n_block: int = 15)[source]

Bases: Module

PixelCNN model for autoregressive generative modeling of images.

Architecture:

  1. FirstBlock - Type-A MaskedConv + BN

  2. n_block x ResidualBlock - Type-B MaskedConv with skip connections

  3. FinalBlock - projection to logits

Parameters:

  • n_channel (int) – Number of input image channels.

  • h (int) – Bottleneck dimension.

  • discrete_channel (int) – Number of discrete values per channel (default 256).

  • n_block (int) – Number of residual blocks.

forward(x: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Forward pass of PixelCNN.

Parameters:

x (torch.Tensor) – Input image tensor of shape (B, C, H, W).

Returns:

Output logits of shape (B, C, H, W, 256).

Return type:

torch.Tensor

class model.PixelCNNAutoencoder[source]

Bases: Module

Full autoencoder combining a convolutional Encoder with a ConditionalPixelCNN decoder.

The encoder maps an input image to a latent vector z; the decoder reconstructs the image autoregressively conditioned on z.

forward(x: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Encode x to z, then decode autoregressively conditioned on z.

Parameters:

x (torch.Tensor) – Input image tensor of shape (B, C, H, W).

Returns:

Reconstructed image logits of shape (B, C, H, W, 256).

Return type:

torch.Tensor

class model.PixelRNN(n_channel: int = 3, h: int = 32, n_block: int = 12, discrete_channel: int = 256)[source]

Bases: Module

PixelRNN model using Row-LSTM residual blocks for autoregressive generation.

Architecture:

MaskedConv(A) -> n_block x ResidualRowLSTMBlock -> 1x1 Conv -> logits

Parameters:

  • n_channel (int) – Number of image channels (1 for MNIST, 3 for CIFAR-10).

  • h (int) – Hidden dimension (the masked conv produces 2*h channels).

  • n_block (int) – Number of ResidualRowLSTMBlock layers.

  • discrete_channel (int) – Number of discrete intensity values (default 256).

forward(x: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Forward pass of PixelRNN.

Parameters:

x (torch.Tensor) – Input image tensor of shape (B, C, H, W).

Returns:

Output logits of shape (B, C, H, W, 256).

Return type:

torch.Tensor
